summary: Full-stack developer and automation engineer with hands-on experience building production web applications, async data pipelines, and self-hosted infrastructure. Combines a background in fiber-optic network installation with a passion for writing clean, well-tested software that solves real problems.

experience.description: Design, build, and maintain a suite of self-hosted web applications and developer tools serving both business operations and personal projects.
highlights: Built a multi-user job-scraping platform with FastAPI, Celery, and SSE real-time streaming, backed by 795+ automated tests
Developed a cannabis terpene analyzer with a Next.js frontend, FastAPI backend, and cosine-similarity recommendation engine
Architected a dual-domain Express.js application with equipment catalog, scheduling, invoicing, and S3-compatible file storage
Designed a Docker-label-driven Cloudflare Tunnel manager that auto-provisions DNS, ingress rules, and Zero Trust Access policies
Managed all infrastructure on a self-hosted Linux server with Docker Compose, Cloudflare Tunnels, and automated CI/CD

experience.description: Install and maintain residential and commercial fiber-optic internet service, including structured wiring, ONT configuration, and network troubleshooting.
highlights: Completed 1,000+ fiber installations with consistently high customer satisfaction ratings
Performed structured wiring, media panel installs, and whole-home networking solutions
Diagnosed and resolved complex network issues across GPON and XGS-PON architectures
Trained new technicians on installation best practices and safety procedures

experience.description: Built websites and internal tools for small businesses, focusing on responsive design and reliable hosting.
highlights: Delivered full-stack web applications for local businesses using Node.js and React
Set up Docker-based hosting environments with automated backups and monitoring
Implemented payment processing, booking systems, and contact forms with input validation and security hardening

education.description: Focused on programming fundamentals, networking, and systems administration.
Ongoing self-education through building production applications, contributing to open source, and completing online courses in full-stack development, cloud infrastructure, and automation.
